SELECT table_name, ordinal_position, column_name, column_type, is_nullable, column_default, column_key, extra, column_comment FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='pmacontrol' ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position
LIMIT 5000

rows.column_comment: if = 0 we backup all, else database coma separated
start value when sequences is created or value if RESTART is used
increment value
0 if no cycles are allowed, 1 if the sequence should begin a new cycle when maximum_value is passed

if yes value is equal to id
coma separated
used in future for explain format=json
